Moments that

transcend time.

Book BeeVelt Halls for your weddings, galas, conferences, corporate events, and private celebrations, Lagos' premier event venue platform.

View Availability
The Venue

Where elegance
meets grandeur.

Nestled in the heart of Lekki, BeeVelt Halls is an architectural masterpiece designed to transform your most cherished moments into timeless memories. With soaring ceilings adorned with hand-painted frescoes, crystal chandeliers that cast ethereal light, and Italian marble floors that echo with elegance.

Our dedicated team of event specialists ensures every detail is executed with precision, from custom lighting design to curated catering experiences. The main hall accommodates up to 500 guests, while our intimate garden terrace provides a serene outdoor option.

500 Guest Capacity
1,200 sqm Floor Area
200 Parking Spaces
Full AC
Backup Generator
Commercial Kitchen
Bridal Suite
High-Speed Wi-Fi
Packages

Curated experiences

Each package is designed to provide everything you need for a flawless event, from intimate gatherings to grand celebrations.

The Gala — Full Day

  • Tables & chairs for 300
  • Basic sound system
  • Standard lighting
  • 2 security personnel

  • Wi-Fi

₦1,200,000

The Celebration — Weekend

  • Tables & chairs for 500

Availability

Plan your perfect
date with us.

Our real-time availability calendar helps you find the perfect date for your event. Booked dates are marked in red, while blocked dates indicate maintenance or private holds. Every booking includes a 2-hour setup and teardown buffer.

For weekend celebrations and peak season events, we recommend booking at least 3 months in advance to secure your preferred dates.

Check Full Calendar

Begin your journey

Let us help you create an event that will be remembered for a lifetime. Get in touch with our team today.
